published_prior_art.cite: ChernozhukovEtAl2018DML + standard AIPW double-robust drift identity
KennedyBalakrishnanRobinsWasserman2024MinimaxCATE gives the below-elbow lower-bound calibration; the Delta_1 separation is algebraic

repo_prior_art.cite: closest is eid_dml_orth_uniform/v2: DML/LRO/ADML variance-report frontier, not a Holder CATE q_star order frontier

published_prior_art.cite: KennedyBalakrishnanRobinsWasserman2024MinimaxCATE gives minimax rates and a localized HOIF/R-learner upper construction, but not a necessary-and-sufficient minimal orthogonalization-order index q_star

novelty_flags.label: Conjecture 1
novelty_flags.one_line: The closest published overlap is Kennedy et al.'s localized higher-order local-polynomial R-learner upper construction, not only their elbow; §8 should compare q_star/K_q directly against that estimator and add LiTchetgenVanDerVaartRobins2011 as a treatment-effect HOIF interval precedent.

soundness_flags.label: Theorem 2
soundness_flags.one_line: The first-order impossibility step does not follow from the stated assumptions: Assumption 4 gives only upper localized nuisance rates, but Theorem 2 needs lower-bounded, aligned nuisance estimation errors or a minimax lower-bound quantifier over A1.

soundness_flags.label: Theorem 2
soundness_flags.one_line: The proof sketch jumps from the AIPW product identity to non-negligible drift on wavelet witnesses; it names no estimator-risk lower-bound or least-favorable nuisance argument showing every A1 learner incurs that product drift.

strengthening_paths.suggestion: Restate Theorem 2 as either a conditional witness theorem for specified nuisance perturbations, or as a Conjecture with an explicit minimax lower-bound premise over first-order AIPW learners.
Add a Kennedy-specific comparator paragraph for their localized higher-order local-polynomial R-learner: identify exactly what q_star and K_q add beyond their upper-rate construction.

Add Li et al. 2011, 'Higher order inference on a treatment effect under low regularity conditions,' as the closest published treatment-effect HOIF interval precedent and explain why local CATE q_star is not already covered.

recommended_next_step: Patch Theorem 2's quantifiers/lower-bound premise and strengthen the HOIF prior-art comparison before sending another Stage -0.5 pass.
